diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -89,6 +89,10 @@
 

     def forward(self, observations: Dict[str, torch.Tensor]) -> torch.Tensor:

         image = observations["image"].float() / 255.0

+        # Handle both HWC (when VecTranspose fails) and CHW formats.

+        # Our stacked image has 12 channels; if last dim is 12 it's HWC.

+        if image.shape[-1] == 12:

+            image = image.permute(0, 3, 1, 2)

         image_features = self.cnn(image)

 

         vector = observations["vector"]

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -46,19 +46,8 @@
         super().__init__(verbose)

         os.makedirs(log_dir, exist_ok=True)

         self.file = open(os.path.join(log_dir, "metrics.jsonl"), "w")

-        self.cumulative_timesteps = 0

 

     def _on_step(self) -> bool:

-        return True

-

-    def _on_rollout_end(self) -> None:

-        pass  # DQN does not have rollouts; we log in _on_step every update

-

-    def _on_training_end(self) -> None:

-        self.file.close()

-

-    def _on_step(self) -> bool:

-        # DQN calls _on_step after each env step; we log every 1000 steps to keep it light

         if self.model.num_timesteps % 2000 == 0:

             if self.model.ep_info_buffer:

                 rewards = [ep["r"] for ep in self.model.ep_info_buffer]

@@ -69,6 +58,9 @@
             self.file.write(json.dumps(log_entry) + "\n")

             self.file.flush()

         return True

+

+    def _on_training_end(self) -> None:

+        self.file.close()

 

 if __name__ == "__main__":

     os.makedirs("checkpoints", exist_ok=True)

@@ -83,7 +75,7 @@
 

     for env_id in TRAIN_ENVS:

         safe_name = env_id.replace("'", "").replace('"', "").replace("/", "_")

-        print(f"\n=== Training {env_id} ===")

+        print(f"\n=== Training {env_id} ===", flush=True)

 

         venv = create_venv_for_env(env_id)

 

@@ -112,7 +104,7 @@
         model.learn(total_timesteps=TOTAL_TIMESTEPS_PER_ENV, callback=callback, progress_bar=False)

 

         model.save(f"checkpoints/model_{safe_name}")

-        print(f"Saved checkpoints/model_{safe_name}")

+        print(f"Saved checkpoints/model_{safe_name}", flush=True)

 

         venv.close()
